offer: For law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient time log conversion causes delayed billing. We automate the formatting instead of manual formatting of billing statements.
problem: Inefficient conversion of time logs into billing statements.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm accountants
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to law firm accountants with demo video
Community forums for law firm accountants sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry and template selection for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
